full_text:
Received a “big” piece of adnexa tissue. It was exceptionally hard, homogeneous - all tumor. Removed capsule.

The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H).

Dispase dissociation media included 14.55 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 300 µl Dispase + 150 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 13.35 ml DMEM/F12+++, 1.5 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 150 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 2 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 2 mL of DMEM/F12+++.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

No, due to low amount of cells.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E4 cells/ml] | 4.93 | 5.34
 | live [E4 cells/ml] | 1.23 | 0
 | viability [%] | 25.0 | 0.0
 | size [µm] | 37.0 | 21.8
2) | total [E4 cells/ml] | 8.21 | 1.23
 | live [E3 cells/ml] | 4.11 | 0
 | viability [%] | 5.0 | 0.0
 | size [µm] | 29.9 | 22.4
